briefdescription.para: Main Flash memory mapped at 0x00000000.
System Flash memory mapped at 0x00000000.
Embedded SRAM mapped at 0x00000000.
QUADSPI mapped at 0x00000000.
Return the boot mode as configured by user.

parameterdescription.para:
boot mode as configured by user. The returned value can be one of the following values:
SYSCFG_BOOT_MAINFLASH
SYSCFG_BOOT_SYSTEMFLASH
SYSCFG_BOOT_SRAM

briefdescription.para: SRAM2 page 0 to 31 write protection enable macro.

parameterdescription.para: This parameter can be a combination of values of SRAM2 Page Write protection (0 to 31)

simplesect.para: Write protection can only be disabled by a system reset

briefdescription.para: SRAM2 page write protection unlock prior to erase.

simplesect.para: Writing a wrong key reactivates the write protection

briefdescription.para: SRAM2 erase.

simplesect.para: __SYSCFG_GET_FLAG(SYSCFG_FLAG_SRAM2_BUSY) may be used to check end of erase

briefdescription.para: Floating Point Unit interrupt enable/disable macros.

parameterdescription.para: This parameter can be a value of FPU Interrupts

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break ECC lock. Enable and lock the connection of Flash ECC error connection to TIM1/8/15/16/17 Break input.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked only by system reset.

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break Cortex-M4 Lockup lock. Enable and lock the connection of Cortex-M4 LOCKUP (Hardfault) output to TIM1/8/15/16/17 Break input.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked only by system reset.

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break PVD lock. Enable and lock the PVD connection to Timer1/8/15/16/17 Break input, as well as the PVDE and PLS[2:0] in the PWR_CR2 register.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked only by system reset.

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break SRAM2 parity lock. Enable and lock the SRAM2 parity error signal connection to TIM1/8/15/16/17 Break input.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked by system reset.

briefdescription.para: Check SYSCFG flag is set or not.

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the flag to check. This parameter can be one of the following values:
SYSCFG_FLAG_SRAM2_PE SRAM2 Parity Error Flag
SYSCFG_FLAG_SRAM2_BUSY SRAM2 Erase Ongoing
new state of FLAG (TRUE or FALSE).

briefdescription.para: Set the SPF bit to clear the SRAM Parity Error Flag.
Fast-mode Plus driving capability enable/disable macros.

parameterdescription.para:
This parameter can be a value of :
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB6 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB6
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB7 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB7
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB8 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB8
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB9 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB9

briefdescription.para: Main Flash memory mapped at 0x00000000.
System Flash memory mapped at 0x00000000.
Embedded SRAM mapped at 0x00000000.
QUADSPI mapped at 0x00000000.
Return the boot mode as configured by user.

parameterdescription.para:
boot mode as configured by user. The returned value can be one of the following values:
SYSCFG_BOOT_MAINFLASH
SYSCFG_BOOT_SYSTEMFLASH
SYSCFG_BOOT_SRAM

briefdescription.para: SRAM2 page 0 to 31 write protection enable macro.

parameterdescription.para: This parameter can be a combination of values of SRAM2 Page Write protection (0 to 31)

simplesect.para: Write protection can only be disabled by a system reset

briefdescription.para: SRAM2 page write protection unlock prior to erase.

simplesect.para: Writing a wrong key reactivates the write protection

briefdescription.para: SRAM2 erase.

simplesect.para: __SYSCFG_GET_FLAG(SYSCFG_FLAG_SRAM2_BUSY) may be used to check end of erase

briefdescription.para: Floating Point Unit interrupt enable/disable macros.

parameterdescription.para: This parameter can be a value of FPU Interrupts

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break ECC lock. Enable and lock the connection of Flash ECC error connection to TIM1/8/15/16/17 Break input.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked only by system reset.

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break Cortex-M4 Lockup lock. Enable and lock the connection of Cortex-M4 LOCKUP (Hardfault) output to TIM1/8/15/16/17 Break input.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked only by system reset.

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break PVD lock. Enable and lock the PVD connection to Timer1/8/15/16/17 Break input, as well as the PVDE and PLS[2:0] in the PWR_CR2 register.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked only by system reset.

briefdescription.para: SYSCFG Break SRAM2 parity lock. Enable and lock the SRAM2 parity error signal connection to TIM1/8/15/16/17 Break input.

simplesect.para: The selected configuration is locked and can be unlocked by system reset.

briefdescription.para: Check SYSCFG flag is set or not.

parameterdescription.para:
specifies the flag to check. This parameter can be one of the following values:
SYSCFG_FLAG_SRAM2_PE SRAM2 Parity Error Flag
SYSCFG_FLAG_SRAM2_BUSY SRAM2 Erase Ongoing
new state of FLAG (TRUE or FALSE).

briefdescription.para: Set the SPF bit to clear the SRAM Parity Error Flag.
Fast-mode Plus driving capability enable/disable macros.

parameterdescription.para:
This parameter can be a value of :
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB6 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB6
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB7 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB7
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB8 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB8
SYSCFG_FASTMODEPLUS_PB9 Fast-mode Plus driving capability activation on PB9
